mapper.select:
SELECT n.id, n.title, n.content, n.notice_type, n.receiver_type, n.status, n.withdraw_status, n.total_receiver_count, n.read_count, n.sender_name, n.send_time, n.create_time FROM sys_notification n WHERE n.is_deleted = 0 AND n.status = 1
AND n.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
AND n.notice_type = #{noticeType}
AND ( EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys_user_notification un WHERE un.notification_id = n.id AND un.user_id = #{userId} AND un.is_deleted = 0 ) OR (n.receiver_type = 2 AND FIND_IN_SET(#{deptId}, n.receiver_ids)) OR n.receiver_type = 4 )
ORDER BY n.create_time DESC
